feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Chemical Abundances Shape History (CASH). I. A Link between Giant Planets Orbital Periods and Host Stellar C/O Ratios
entry.content:
Authors: R Zhang, JW Xie, M Pan, B Liu, JL Zhou, J Wang... - arXiv preprint arXiv ..., 2026

Abstract: ... near PB ≈ 35 days, close to our fiducial boundary of 30days and consistent with the transition region between hot and warm Jupiters . ... Future high-precision spectroscopic surveys of exoplanet hosts, coupled with advanced hydrodynamical ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

entry.title: Extreme Arabian environments and their microbiomes: new frontiers for astrobiology and biosignature discovery
entry.content:
Authors: J Schultz, PM García-Martínez, S Altalhi, N Kontis... - Extremophiles, 2026

Abstract: ... Astrobiology assesses the habitability of planetary bodies and the potential for extraterrestrial life . Analog environments on Earth serve as ... The primary objective of astrobiology is to assess the potential habitability of planetary bodies in this solar ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

entry.title: EFFECT OF INULIN AND ALOE VERA EXTRACT ON FUNCTIONAL PARAMETERS IN THE PRODUCTION OF WHEY-BASED BEVERAGES

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: I Ismaylov - Вестник науки, 2026

Abstract: The demand for functional beverages in the modern food industry is growing rapidly. This research is devoted to studying the effect of inulin and aloe vera extract on the physicochemical, rheological, and organoleptic parameters in the production of whey-based ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

entry.title: The master molecule that built biology: How water shaped the chemistry of life

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: J DiGiacomo, GD Rose, LD Williams - Protein Science, 2026

Abstract: The deep entanglement of biomolecular structure and function with aqueous systems supports the view that water actively sculpted both molecules and processes during the origins of life and continues to constrain evolution today ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: AA Nekludoff

Journal: 2026

Abstract: ... Standard approaches to abiogenesis are typically framed in terms of constructing specific biomolecular structures under controlled conditions, ... This leads to a reformulation of abiogenesis : not as a problem of molecular construction, but as a ...

entry.title: Chirality's journey: Pasteur, Kelvin, the origins of life , chiral nanotechnologies, and insights from AI

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: A Govorov, DA Govorov, S Hoffman - Chem, 2026

Abstract: This backstory recounts several episodes in the development of chirality by tracing how the definition proposed by Lord Kelvin appeared about 50 years after Pasteur's discovery of molecular dissymmetry, which is essentially chirality. Kelvin's concepts ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

entry.title: Rate-Independent Control and the Origin of Life

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: C Mason

Abstract: This paper develops a unified interpretive framework for evaluating origin - of - life claims. The framework draws on four intellectual contributions in retrospect: Peirce's logic of triadic sign relations, Turing's formal model of sequential symbolic procedure ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life
